description_long: This object is a highly detailed model of a red-crowned crane, depicted with its wings fully outstretched in a graceful, upward flight posture. The body is slender and elongated, with long, thin legs trailing behind and a long neck extending forward, ending in a pointed beak. The plumage is predominantly white, with striking black accents on the wingtips, neck, and legs, and a distinctive red patch on the crown of the head. The wings are broad and slightly curved, giving the impression of dynamic movement. The surface appears smooth and feathered, with subtle texturing to suggest the natural layering of feathers. The overall form is elegant and streamlined, capturing the essence of this iconic bird in mid-flight.
description: A lifelike red-crowned crane with outstretched wings, white plumage, black accents, and a red crown, depicted in a dynamic flight pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the crane's wings fully extended horizontally, with the head and long legs aligned vertically.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the crane's slender body, long neck, and trailing legs, with one wing visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetrical spread of the wings and the alignment of the legs and tail feathers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the crane's profile with the head turned slightly and one wing in focus.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with broad span and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and elongated tail feathers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear; legs are extended as in flight.
attribute_cockpit_placement: No cockpit present; head and beak form the forward section.
